name: Google Ads Transparency — Competitor Research
description: Open the Google Ads Transparency Center for a domain in India and extract active ad counts, advertiser labels, and creative links.

steps: Expand See all ads if available
Extract ad count, advertiser labels, and creative links
guards: Use DOMAIN as the landing-page domain, not the brand name
domain_lookup.why: Direct domain URLs are more stable than homepage search interaction.

errors.error: the page confirms inventory, not conversion metrics
errors.context: Google Ads Transparency does not expose performance data
errors.solution: Use count, repetition, and landing-page fit as outside signals.

steps.description: Open the Ads Transparency Center for the domain
Wait for the domain results page

steps.code: (() => { const button = [...document.querySelectorAll('material-button, button, [role="button"]')].find((el) => (el.innerText || '').includes('See all ads')); if (!button) return { expanded: false }; button.click(); return { expanded: true }; })()
steps.description: Expand the ad grid when See all ads is available
Allow the grid to settle after expansion

steps.code: (() => { const text = document.body.innerText; const adCount = text.match(/\b\d+ ads\b/i)?.[0] || null; const advertisers = [...new Set([...document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/advertiser/']")].map((el) => (el.textContent || '').trim()).filter(Boolean))].slice(0, 10); const creativeLinks = [...document.querySelectorAll("a[href*='/advertiser/'][href*='/creative/']")].map((el) => el.href).slice(0, 20); return { domain: `{DOMAIN}`, url: location.href, adCount, advertisers, creativeLinks }; })()
steps.description: Extract ad count, advertiser labels, and creative links
Capture the Google ad results page
